title: NIMHANS Notification 2026 - Walk-in interview for Senior Research Fellow Posts
description: The National Institute of Mental Health and Neuro Sciences (NIMHANS) has officially released the notification to fill the vacancies of 01 Senior Research Fellow Posts. Interested and eligibile candidates can use this opportunity to apply for these posts before the last date of application. Candidates who have completed their Post-graduation can apply for the NIMHANS Notification 2026. The interested applicants can attend the walk-in interview. Here we have mentioned the education details, age...
